compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
<<quitting notice>> email to boss, no commas, formal tone, no personal details, concise, no salutations or sign-offs
response:
<<quitting notice>>

I am writing to inform you of my decision to resign from my position at the company. My last working day will be [insert date]. 

I have enjoyed my time here and am grateful for the opportunities and experiences I have gained. 

I will ensure a smooth transition of my responsibilities and will assist in any way possible during this period.

Thank you for your understanding.
